description:
2024 Audi SQ5, 3.0L TC V6, AWD, 354bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 249,000 or AED 3,901 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years 
 - Mileage 14,257 KM’s - Full Audi Service History - Audi Warranty Until March 2029 - Audi Service Contract Until March 2029 Or 75,000km’s - Price includes VAT 
 - Apple Car Play / Android Auto - Bang & Olufsen Sound System - Glass Panoramic Sunroof - Front & Rear Parking Sensors - Power Folding Mirrors - Blind Spot Assist - Electric Memory Seats - 21” Alloy Wheels - Nappa Leather Cross Stitched Seats - Ambient Lighting - Virtual Cockpit - Automatic Headlights - Automatic Wipers - Cruise Control - Voice Control - Dual Zone Climate Control - Keyless Entry - Bluetooth - Satellite Navigation - Carbon Fibre Interior
